name: Discord
shortDescription: Automate Discord roles using on-chain asset and gate conditions.
longDescription: The Discord Roles module connects your dGuild to Discord via the DecentraGuild bot. Track mints and automate role assignments using advanced AND/OR logic across SPL tokens, NFTs, traits, Discord roles, and gates.
detailedDescription: Features include mint catalog tracking, up to 5 logical conditions per role, AND/OR rule composition, NFT trait filtering, SPL token balance checks, gate integration, multi-wallet linking per Discord user, and multi-dGuild support. Members verify once and can link multiple wallets across multiple dGuilds.
keyInfo: - Up to 5 rule conditions per role

activationInstructions.intro: Bridge your guildhall and your Discord keep. Let roles be earned, not granted.
activationInstructions.note: Sync interval depends on holder count: 15 minutes to 6 hours.
